Decompose vector v into components parallel and perpendicular to normal n. If n has zero magnitude both outputs are zeroed; otherwise proj_out = dot(v,n)/dot(n,n)*n, perp_out = v - proj_out.
Compute the angle (radians, via acos) between two 3D vectors v1 and v2. Returns angle offset from PI/2 (i.e. returns acos(dot(v1,v2)/(|v1||v2|)) - PI/2).
Reflect vector v about surface normal n: out = v - 2*dot(v,n)*n.

Return the sample rate for the given codec index (0=22050, 1=44100). Asserts index in [0, 2).
Convert linear gain [0,1] to DirectSound volume in hundredths of dB. Clamps to [-10000, ceiling].
Convert pitch scalar to DirectSound frequency. Asserts sample_rate is 22050 or 44100. Clamps result.
Return pointer to actual dsound channel struct by index. Asserts index in [0, dsound_globals.actual_channel_count) and < MAXIMUM_SOUND_CHANNELS.
Return pointer to virtual channel struct by index. Asserts index in [0, dsound_globals.virtual_channel_count) and < MAXIMUM_SOUND_CHANNELS.
Build and apply full 3D buffer parameters (volumes, orientation, rolloff) to the given channel.
Check if a stopping channel has finished and release it. Returns true if the channel was released.
Log a DirectSound error with HRESULT code and descriptive message.
